title: TaskResult
description: Milestone-1 text-to-text result contract for Mode 1 run().

schemaVersion.description: Contract schema version used to interpret the result payload.

runId.description: Opaque run identifier assigned or normalized by the engine.

output.description: Normalized text output returned by the selected provider.

type.description: Output payload kind for milestone text-to-text execution.

text.description: Generated text returned to the caller.

usage.description: Optional normalized token usage information reported by the provider.

inputTokens.description: Number of input tokens consumed, when reported by the provider.

outputTokens.description: Number of output tokens generated, when reported by the provider.

totalTokens.description: Total token count, when reported by the provider.

telemetry.description: Required minimal telemetry summary attached to every result.

providerUsed.description: Identifier of the provider selected for the completed attempt.

totalMs.description: Total measured execution duration in milliseconds.

errorClass.description: Optional normalized error class if the result represents a provider-level error outcome.
